'''faboko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:podagric|podagric]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podagric|podagric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| faboko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæbeketh|fæbeketh]] || [[word:fæbekej|fæbekej]] || [[word:fæbekesh|fæbekesh]] || [[word:fæbeke|fæbeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabobokoth|fabobokoth]] || [[word:fabobokoj|fabobokoj]] || [[word:fabobokosh|fabobokosh]] || [[word:faboboko|faboboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabokoth|fabokoth]] || [[word:fabokoj|fabokoj]] || [[word:fabokosh|fabokosh]] || [[word:faboko|faboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabofkoth|fabofkoth]] || [[word:fabofkoj|fabofkoj]] || [[word:fabofkosh|fabofkosh]] || [[word:fabofkof|fabofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fabokotho|fabokotho]] || [[word:fabokojo|fabokojo]] || [[word:fabokosho|fabokosho]] || [[word:fabokoko|fabokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fabokoth|fabokoth]] || [[word:fabokoj|fabokoj]] || [[word:fabokosh|fabokosh]] || [[word:faboko|faboko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fabokothol|fabokothol]] || [[word:fabokojol|fabokojol]] || [[word:fabokoshol|fabokoshol]] || [[word:fabokokol|fabokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fabokothotho|fabokothotho]] || [[word:fabokojojo|fabokojojo]] || [[word:fabokoshosho|fabokoshosho]] || [[word:fabokoko|fabokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fabokothon|fabokothon]] || [[word:fabokojon|fabokojon]] || [[word:fabokoshon|fabokoshon]] || [[word:fabokokon|fabokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fabokothoro|fabokothoro]] || [[word:fabokojoro|fabokojoro]] || [[word:fabokoshoro|fabokoshoro]] || [[word:fabokokoro|fabokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
